subServices.name: Shrink Wrapping
subServices.description: Industrial shrink wrapping solutions for machinery, pallets, and export cargo ensuring complete protection from moisture, dust, and environmental damage. Our heat-applied shrink films create a tight, tamper-evident barrier around goods of all sizes.

subcategories.name: Heat Shrink Packaging
subcategories.description: High-temperature polyolefin shrink film packaging for secure, tamper-proof industrial wrapping of components and machinery.

subcategories.name: UV Protected Shrink
subcategories.description: UV-stabilized shrink wrapping designed for outdoor storage and long-distance open cargo transit under direct sunlight.

subcategories.name: Heavy Duty Shrink Covers
subcategories.description: Extra-thick 300GSM shrink covers engineered for oversized machinery, transformers, and heavy industrial equipment.

endProducts.name: Machine Shrink Covers
endProducts.description: Custom-fit heat shrink covers tailored to protect CNC machines, generators, and factory equipment during storage and transit.

endProducts.name: Pallet Shrink Wrapping
endProducts.description: Complete pallet-level shrink wrapping service ensuring load stability and weather protection for palletized shipments.

endProducts.name: Export Packing Covers
endProducts.description: ISPM-15 compliant shrink covers built to meet international shipping standards for ocean and air freight.

endProducts.name: Weatherproof Covers
endProducts.description: All-weather shrink film covers providing moisture, dust, and UV protection for long-term outdoor storage.

subServices.name: Tarpaulin Packaging
subServices.description: Heavy-duty tarpaulin-based packaging solutions designed for outdoor protection and transportation of industrial goods. Our tarpaulin covers are reinforced with eyelet holes and UV-stabilized for extended service life.

subcategories.name: HDPE Tarpaulin
subcategories.description: High-density polyethylene woven tarpaulin with superior tear resistance and waterproofing for heavy-duty applications.

subcategories.name: LDPE Tarpaulin
subcategories.description: Low-density polyethylene tarpaulin offering flexibility and economical protection for temporary storage covers.

subcategories.name: Laminated Tarpaulin
subcategories.description: Multi-layer laminated tarpaulin with enhanced moisture barrier properties for export-grade cargo protection.

endProducts.name: Waterproof Equipment Covers
endProducts.description: Custom-sewn tarpaulin covers with reinforced grommets designed to protect machinery from rain and humidity.

endProducts.name: Transport Covers
endProducts.description: Durable tarpaulin transport covers for open trucks and flatbed trailers ensuring cargo safety during road transit.

endProducts.name: Outdoor Storage Covers
endProducts.description: UV-stabilized tarpaulin covers built for long-term outdoor storage of raw materials and finished products.

subServices.name: Silpaulin Packaging
subServices.description: Advanced multi-layer silpaulin packaging offering high durability and moisture resistance for industrial applications. Cross-laminated construction provides exceptional puncture and tear resistance compared to standard tarpaulin.

subcategories.name: Cross Laminated Sheets
subcategories.description: Cross-woven laminated silpaulin sheets with multi-directional strength for wrapping heavy industrial cargo.

subcategories.name: Multi-layer Silpaulin
subcategories.description: Premium multi-ply silpaulin with reinforced layers providing superior moisture barrier and mechanical protection.

endProducts.name: Heavy Machinery Covers
endProducts.description: Reinforced silpaulin covers for generators, turbines, and heavy factory equipment during shipping and open storage.

endProducts.name: Export-Grade Wrapping
endProducts.description: Export-standard silpaulin wrapping meeting international maritime packaging requirements for corrosion-free transit.

endProducts.name: Moisture Barrier Covers
endProducts.description: High-performance moisture-proof silpaulin covers preventing condensation damage during sea freight shipments.

subServices.name: Stretch Wrapping
subServices.description: Flexible stretch wrapping solutions for securing loads, pallet wrapping, and industrial bundling. Our LLDPE stretch films offer high elongation and puncture resistance for superior load containment.

subcategories.name: Hand Stretch Film
subcategories.description: Manual-grade stretch film rolls for hand-applied pallet wrapping and bundling in warehouses and loading docks.

subcategories.name: Machine Stretch Film
subcategories.description: High-performance machine-grade stretch film compatible with automated and semi-automatic pallet wrappers.

subcategories.name: Pre-stretched Film
subcategories.description: Pre-stretched film requiring minimal force to apply, reducing operator fatigue and improving wrapping consistency.

endProducts.name: Pallet Wrapping
endProducts.description: Complete pallet wrapping service using stretch film for load unitization and transit protection.

endProducts.name: Carton Bundling
endProducts.description: Stretch film bundling for grouping multiple cartons and boxes together for efficient handling and shipping.

endProducts.name: Load Stabilization Packaging
endProducts.description: Stretch wrapping solutions designed to prevent load shifting and product damage during road and rail transit.

subServices.name: Vacuum Packaging
subServices.description: Vacuum packaging solutions designed to eliminate moisture and prevent corrosion during export and storage. Our vacuum barrier bags create an airtight environment that shields metal surfaces from oxidation.

subcategories.name: Barrier Vacuum Bags
subcategories.description: Multi-layer barrier vacuum bags with aluminum foil lamination for maximum oxygen and moisture exclusion.

subcategories.name: Aluminum Foil Vacuum Packaging
subcategories.description: Heavy-duty aluminum foil vacuum packaging for sensitive electronics, precision instruments, and metal components.

endProducts.name: Moisture-Free Packing
endProducts.description: Vacuum-sealed moisture-free packaging ensuring zero condensation damage during ocean freight and cold storage.

endProducts.name: Export Vacuum Packaging
endProducts.description: International-standard vacuum packaging with desiccant and humidity indicators for export machinery shipments.

endProducts.name: Corrosion Prevention Packing
endProducts.description: VCI-enhanced vacuum packing creating an oxygen-free environment for long-term metal part preservation.

subServices.name: VCI Packaging
subServices.description: VCI-based anti-corrosion packaging solutions for protecting metal components during storage and transit. Volatile Corrosion Inhibitor molecules create an invisible protective layer on metal surfaces without direct contact.

subcategories.name: VCI Films
subcategories.description: VCI polyethylene films releasing corrosion-inhibiting vapors for wrapping ferrous and non-ferrous metal parts.

subcategories.name: VCI Papers
subcategories.description: VCI-treated kraft papers for interleaving, wrapping, and void-filling in metal component packaging.

subcategories.name: VCI Bags
subcategories.description: Ready-to-use VCI poly bags in standard and custom sizes for quick packaging of small to medium metal parts.

endProducts.name: Anti-Corrosion Packing
endProducts.description: Complete anti-corrosion packaging solutions combining VCI films, papers, and desiccants for maximum rust protection.

endProducts.name: Metal Component Protection
endProducts.description: Specialized VCI packaging for automotive parts, bearings, fasteners, and precision-machined metal components.

endProducts.name: Long-Term Storage Packaging
endProducts.description: VCI barrier packaging designed for 2-5 year corrosion-free storage of spare parts and maintenance inventory.

subServices.name: Wooden Box
subServices.description: Durable wooden packaging boxes designed for heavy machinery and export applications. Our boxes are built from seasoned hardwood with reinforced joints, meeting ISPM-15 international phytosanitary standards.

subcategories.name: Pine Wood Box
subcategories.description: Lightweight pine wood boxes ideal for export packaging with heat treatment certification for international transit.

subcategories.name: Heavy Duty Wooden Crates
subcategories.description: Reinforced crates built with dense timber for transporting machinery and equipment weighing over 500 kg.

subcategories.name: Skid Base Boxes
subcategories.description: Skid-mounted wooden boxes with integrated forklift runners for easy loading and unloading operations.

endProducts.name: Export Wooden Boxes
endProducts.description: ISPM-15 stamped wooden boxes built to international export standards for ocean, air, and road freight.

endProducts.name: Machinery Packaging Boxes
endProducts.description: Custom-dimensioned wooden boxes engineered to safely package CNC machines, motors, and industrial equipment.

endProducts.name: Heavy Equipment Transport Boxes
endProducts.description: Ultra-heavy-duty wooden crates with internal bracing for transporting equipment weighing 2 tonnes and above.

subServices.name: Ply Box
subServices.description: Lightweight and reusable plywood boxes ideal for industrial and export packaging. Built from commercial-grade plywood with precision-cut panels and durable fastening systems for repeated use.

subcategories.name: Plywood Box
subcategories.description: Standard plywood packaging boxes manufactured from 9mm to 18mm commercial plywood with nailless assembly options.

subcategories.name: Foldable Ply Box
subcategories.description: Collapsible plywood boxes with hinge-fold design for space-efficient return logistics and reuse cycles.

endProducts.name: Export Packing Boxes
endProducts.description: Fumigation-free plywood boxes compliant with international export regulations for hassle-free customs clearance.

endProducts.name: Lightweight Machinery Packaging
endProducts.description: Plywood packaging solutions optimized for machinery under 1 tonne, reducing shipping weight and freight costs.

endProducts.name: Reusable Packing Boxes
endProducts.description: Durable plywood boxes designed for 10+ reuse cycles in closed-loop supply chain and reverse logistics operations.

subServices.name: 4-Way Pallet
subServices.description: Four-way entry pallets compatible with forklifts and pallet jacks for efficient material handling. Accessible from all four sides, these pallets are the industry standard for warehouse operations and shipping.

subcategories.name: Wooden 4-Way Pallet
subcategories.description: Classic wooden 4-way entry pallets built from seasoned timber with notched stringers for universal forklift access.

subcategories.name: Plastic 4-Way Pallet
subcategories.description: Hygienic, moisture-proof HDPE plastic pallets with 4-way entry, ideal for pharmaceutical and food industry applications.

endProducts.name: Forklift Compatible Pallets
endProducts.description: Standard-dimension 4-way pallets (1200×1000mm) compatible with all forklift types for seamless warehouse integration.

endProducts.name: Export Pallets
endProducts.description: Heat-treated ISPM-15 compliant 4-way pallets cleared for international export shipments across all destinations.

endProducts.name: Warehouse Storage Pallets
endProducts.description: Heavy-duty 4-way pallets rated for high-rack warehouse storage systems supporting loads up to 1500 kg.

subServices.name: 2-Way Pallet
subServices.description: Two-way pallets designed for basic industrial storage and transportation needs. Economical and strong, these pallets are ideal for straight-line material flow and conveyor-based handling systems.

subcategories.name: Wooden 2-Way Pallet
subcategories.description: Cost-effective wooden 2-way pallets with solid stringer construction for directional forklift handling operations.

endProducts.name: Basic Transport Pallets
endProducts.description: Affordable 2-way pallets for one-way shipments and domestic transportation where 4-way access is not required.

endProducts.name: Industrial Storage Pallets
endProducts.description: Robust 2-way pallets for ground-level industrial storage of heavy raw materials and semi-finished goods.

subServices.name: 3 Ply
subServices.description: Lightweight corrugated boxes suitable for inner packaging and low-weight products. Single-wall construction provides basic cushioning and protection at an economical price point.

subcategories.name: Single Wall Corrugated
subcategories.description: Standard single-wall (B/C flute) corrugated board boxes for light to medium-weight consumer and industrial products.

endProducts.name: Lightweight Cartons
endProducts.description: 3-ply corrugated cartons ideal for FMCG products, electronics accessories, and retail-ready packaging applications.

endProducts.name: Inner Packaging Boxes
endProducts.description: Die-cut 3-ply inner boxes providing cushioned compartments for individual product protection within outer cartons.

subServices.name: 5 Ply
subServices.description: Medium strength corrugated packaging for industrial applications. Double-wall construction offers enhanced stacking strength and impact resistance for heavier products and longer supply chains.

subcategories.name: Double Wall Corrugated
subcategories.description: Double-wall (BC flute) corrugated board boxes providing superior crush resistance for medium to heavy industrial goods.

endProducts.name: Medium Duty Cartons
endProducts.description: 5-ply corrugated cartons engineered for automotive spare parts, hardware components, and industrial equipment packaging.

endProducts.name: Industrial Packaging Boxes
endProducts.description: Robust 5-ply boxes with high burst strength for factory-to-warehouse and inter-plant material movement.

subServices.name: 7 Ply
subServices.description: Heavy-duty corrugated boxes designed for export and high load capacity. Triple-wall construction provides maximum protection for heavy, fragile, or high-value industrial products.

subcategories.name: Triple Wall Corrugated
subcategories.description: Triple-wall (BAC flute) corrugated board delivering the highest crush and burst strength for heavyweight cargo.

endProducts.name: Heavy Duty Cartons
endProducts.description: 7-ply heavy duty cartons capable of supporting loads up to 50 kg per box for industrial part shipments.

endProducts.name: Export Packaging Boxes
endProducts.description: Export-grade 7-ply corrugated boxes meeting international packaging standards for sea and air freight.

endProducts.name: High Load Bearing Boxes
endProducts.description: Maximum-strength 7-ply boxes engineered for stacking in warehouses and containers without compression damage.

subServices.name: Packaging Consumables
subServices.description: Supporting consumables used in industrial packaging and securing applications. From strapping solutions to cushioning materials, we supply everything needed to complete your packaging line.

optionalAddOnCategory.name: Cord Strap & Buckles
optionalAddOnCategory.description: Polyester cord straps with GI wire buckles for heavy-duty bundling and pallet load securing.

optionalAddOnCategory.name: PET Strap
optionalAddOnCategory.description: High-tensile PET strapping rolls for automated and manual strapping of cartons, crates, and pallets.

optionalAddOnCategory.name: Lashing Belt & Machine
optionalAddOnCategory.description: Industrial lashing belts and ratchet tensioners for securing heavy cargo on flatbed trucks and containers.

optionalAddOnCategory.name: BOPP Tape
optionalAddOnCategory.description: Biaxially-oriented polypropylene adhesive tape for sealing corrugated boxes and general packaging applications.

optionalAddOnCategory.name: Shrink Tape
optionalAddOnCategory.description: Heat-activated shrink tape for securing shrink wrap edges and creating reinforced seals on covered cargo.

optionalAddOnCategory.name: Stretch Wrapping Roll
optionalAddOnCategory.description: Premium LLDPE stretch film rolls in 300mm and 450mm widths for pallet wrapping and load stabilization.

optionalAddOnCategory.name: EPE Foam Roll
optionalAddOnCategory.description: Expanded polyethylene foam rolls for cushioning, wrapping, and surface protection of delicate industrial items.

optionalAddOnCategory.name: Air Bubble Roll
optionalAddOnCategory.description: Air bubble wrap rolls providing lightweight cushioning and shock absorption for fragile product packaging.
